title: Lazy Sunday Sea Salt Bhuna Crumble
description: A tangy, crumbly French-inspired dish featuring sea salt and bhuna spices in a low-carb-friendly recipe perfect for lazy Sundays.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Stir in onions, cumin, paprika, sea salt, and black pepper. Cook for an additional 10-12 minutes or until slightly caramelized.
Remove chicken from pan and set aside. Reduce remaining liquid to concentrate the flavor.
Serve hot over a bed of mixed greens or as a side dish with crusty bread.
